'''鈭歮-h-l''' ('''kamahal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbed|unbed]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-h-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbed|unbed]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-h-l
|-
! Lemma
| kamahal
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimahal|thimahal]] || [[word:jimahal|jimahal]] || [[word:shimahal|shimahal]] || [[word:kimahal|kimahal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumahal|thuthumahal]] || [[word:jujumahal|jujumahal]] || [[word:shushumahal|shushumahal]] || [[word:kukumahal|kukumahal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumahal|thumahal]] || [[word:jumahal|jumahal]] || [[word:shumahal|shumahal]] || [[word:kumahal|kumahal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumahal|thumahal]] || [[word:jumahal|jumahal]] || [[word:shumahal|shumahal]] || [[word:kumahal|kumahal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themahal|themahal]] || [[word:jemahal|jemahal]] || [[word:shemahal|shemahal]] || [[word:kemahal|kemahal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomahal|thothomahal]] || [[word:jojomahal|jojomahal]] || [[word:shoshomahal|shoshomahal]] || [[word:kokomahal|kokomahal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomahal|thomahal]] || [[word:jomahal|jomahal]] || [[word:shomahal|shomahal]] || [[word:komahal|komahal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomahal|thomahal]] || [[word:jomahal|jomahal]] || [[word:shomahal|shomahal]] || [[word:komahal|komahal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙mahal|th忙mahal]] || [[word:j忙mahal|j忙mahal]] || [[word:sh忙mahal|sh忙mahal]] || [[word:k忙mahal|k忙mahal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamahal|thathamahal]] || [[word:jajamahal|jajamahal]] || [[word:shashamahal|shashamahal]] || [[word:kakamahal|kakamahal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamahal|thamahal]] || [[word:jamahal|jamahal]] || [[word:shamahal|shamahal]] || [[word:kamahal|kamahal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamahal|thamahal]] || [[word:jamahal|jamahal]] || [[word:shamahal|shamahal]] || [[word:kamahal|kamahal]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shamahal|shamahal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshamahal|goshamahal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishamahal|gokishamahal]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shamahaln眉|shamahaln眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshamahalnkn眉|goshamahalnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishamahaln眉|gokishamahaln眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shamahalsh毛|shamahalsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshamahalnksh毛|goshamahalnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishamahalsh毛|gokishamahalsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamahalro|shamahalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamahalnkro|goshamahalnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamahalro|gokishamahalro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shamahalmu|shamahalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamahalnkmu|goshamahalnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamahalmu|gokishamahalmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shamahalsher|shamahalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshamahalnksher|goshamahalnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishamahalsher|gokishamahalsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shamahalng|shamahalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshamahalnkng|goshamahalnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishamahalng|gokishamahalng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shamahalya|shamahalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshamahalnkya|goshamahalnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishamahalya|gokishamahalya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shamahalyam|shamahalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshamahalnkyam|goshamahalnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishamahalyam|gokishamahalyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamahaln眉sh毛|shamahaln眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamahalnkn眉sh毛|goshamahalnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamahaln眉sh毛|gokishamahaln眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamahaln眉ro|shamahaln眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamahalnkn眉ro|goshamahalnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamahaln眉ro|gokishamahaln眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamahaln眉mu|shamahaln眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamahalnkn眉mu|goshamahalnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamahaln眉mu|gokishamahaln眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamahalsh毛n眉|shamahalsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamahalnksh毛n眉|goshamahalnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamahalsh毛n眉|gokishamahalsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamahalsh毛ro|shamahalsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamahalnksh毛ro|goshamahalnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamahalsh毛ro|gokishamahalsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamahalsh毛mu|shamahalsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamahalnksh毛mu|goshamahalnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamahalsh毛mu|gokishamahalsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamahalron眉|shamahalron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamahalnkron眉|goshamahalnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamahalron眉|gokishamahalron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamahalrosh毛|shamahalrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamahalnkrosh毛|goshamahalnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamahalrosh毛|gokishamahalrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamahalromu|shamahalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamahalnkromu|goshamahalnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamahalromu|gokishamahalromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamahalmun眉|shamahalmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamahalnkmun眉|goshamahalnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamahalmun眉|gokishamahalmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamahalmush毛|shamahalmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamahalnkmush毛|goshamahalnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamahalmush毛|gokishamahalmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamahalmuro|shamahalmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamahalnkmuro|goshamahalnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamahalmuro|gokishamahalmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
